instances.name: nba
instances.last_keep: Add TODAY shortcut button to date navigation — button appears between date label and next arrow when

recent.desc: Add TODAY shortcut button to date navigation — button appears between date label and next arrow when
Fix DIFF column operator precedence bug in standings — was always computing pointsFor-pointsAgainst
Color-code seed numbers in standings — gold for playoff seeds 1-6, blue/accent for play-in seeds 7-1
Color-code W-L records in standings (L10/HOME/ROAD/CONF) — green for winning records, red for losing
Add local timezone abbreviation to game times — scheduled games now show e.g. '7:00 PM PST' instead
Show scheduled game times in local timezone — replaced ESPN's ET-hardcoded time string (e.g. '7:00 P
Make standings table horizontally scrollable with sticky team column — added overflow-x:auto scroll
Add CLOSE badge to live games within 5 points — pulsing gold badge in game header gives at-a-glance
Add DIFF (point differential) column to standings table — shows season-aggregate point differential
Add CONF (conference) record column to standings table — shows conference W-L record (e.g. '28-14')
Add team color left-border accent to standings rows — each team's primary color appears as a 3px lef
Add ROAD record column to standings table — shows road W-L record (e.g. '18-22') alongside HOME reco
Add HOME record column to standings table — shows home W-L record (e.g. '25-8') alongside W/L/PCT/GB
Add colored broadcast network badges — ESPN=red, TNT=blue, ABC=blue, NBC=gold, NBA TV=purple; unknow
Add venue/arena name to scheduled game cards — shows e.g. 'Madison Square Garden · New York' below p
Add countdown timer to scheduled games — tip-off status now shows e.g. '7:00 PM EDT · in 2h 35m' for
Improve mobile game card compactness — extend responsive breakpoint to 480px (from 400px) and reduce
Show road/home split records for scheduled games — away team shows ROAD record, home team shows HOME
Add section headers between game groups — 'Live', 'Final', 'Upcoming' labels with game count badges
Make game cards clickable links to ESPN game pages — each card opens espn.com/nba/game page in new t
